song.title: More Love, More Power
song.lyrics:
[V1] .Em C D Em .Em C More love, more power .D Em C D More of You in my life. .Em C More love, more power .D Em More of You in my life.
[C] . Am And I will worship You . D Em With all of my heart. . Am And I will worship You . D Em With all of my mind. . Am And I will worship You . D Em With all of my strength. . C D You are my Lord. . Em You are my Lord.
